title: Fischeria funebris

This plant is native to tropical Africa and is also known as the 'Death Flower' due to its unique and striking appearance. It is a member of the Apocynaceae family, which includes various species of periwinkle, oleander, and other flowering plants. The Apocynaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants that are commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world.
